title: excoecaria biglandulosa var. klotzschiana
intro: Excoecaria biglandulosa var. klotzschiana is a variant of the Excoecaria biglandulosa plant, a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Excoecaria biglandulosa var. klotzschiana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infusion, or used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
